title: Anatherostipa mucronata
taxonomy: Anatherostipa mucronata is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification places Anatherostipa mucronata as a monocotyledonous plant, characterized by having one cotyledon in its seedling stage. The genus Anatherostipa falls under the subfamily Stipoideae, which is a group of grasses native to Australia and surrounding regions. As a member of the Poaceae family, Anatherostipa mucronata is related to other grasses, such as wheat, oats, and barley. Further classification within the family Poaceae can be determined by examining the plant's morphology and genetic characteristics.
